pages.homepage_text:
Redwood Home Contractor is a home contractor in Denver, CO. Founded 2023. We're a team of 12.
Why Denver chooses us
For more than 3 years Redwood Home Contractor has served Denver and the surrounding CO region with dependable, locally-operated home contractor work. Our team of 12 knows the neighborhoods, the buildings, and the seasonal rhythms that shape what our clients actually need — the kind of practical knowledge you only build by showing up in the same zip codes year after year.
Who we serve
We work with homeowners, small businesses, and repeat commercial accounts across Denver. Whether you've worked with a home contractor before or this is your first project, we walk every new client through the process step by step: what to expect, what options exist at your price point, and what we'd recommend if the job were on our own property. No hard sell, no upsell theatre, no contracts you can't cancel.
What we do
Our core offerings cover kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, additions, and deck & patio. Every engagement starts with a site walkthrough and a written scope so there are no surprises on invoice day.
- Kitchen remodels
- Bathroom remodels
- Additions
- Deck & patio
Credentials & proof
Redwood Home Contractor is fully insured and holds every permit and certification the state of CO requires for our trade. Our team of 12 collectively brings decades of hands-on experience, and we publish before-and-after galleries, customer reviews, and project case studies so prospective clients can see the actual work — not just marketing renders.
Get in touch
Email: hello@example.test · Phone: (555) 555-0100
